gate.headline: AMBER: corrected greedy LK E[T] headroom = +1.0..2.4% (EAGLE-3 T=0 ceiling +2.4%, Medusa/single-layer floor +1.0%) -- sharply DOWN from the PR's +8-10% (that is the paper's T=1/sampling headline). Re-ranking channel CLOSED (0.0%, argmax already acceptance-ordered); any gain must come from prediction-improvement, which #80 (likelihood-only) never tested. Marginal prize (~+1-2% E[T] -> ~486-493 TPS): SIZE with a cheap LoRA/projection-layer probe before any GPU fine-tune. Do NOT transfer the +8% headline; do NOT full-launch unsized.

step2_headroom.probe_variance_note: 76-vs-79 E[T] gap is measurement noise on the SAME deployed head, not acceptance headroom

headline_ceiling_NONtransferable.note: PR's +8-10% is the paper's SAMPLING (T=1) headline; sampling acceptance = min(1,p_t/p_d) depends on full-distribution match. Does NOT transfer to our greedy verify.

corrected_greedy_ceiling.note: paper's OWN T=0 numbers (researcher-verified, Llama-3.1-8B). Our head is GREEDY -> these are regime-correct. EAGLE-3 T=0 +2.4% (upper), Medusa/MLP T=0 +1.0-1.2% (lower / single-layer analogue).
corrected_greedy_ceiling.greedy_collapse_factor_vs_headline: T=0 gain is ~3-8x smaller than the T=1 headline (paper's own tables)

nearmiss.interpretation: rank-2 near-misses are 41.7% of rejections, BUT rank-1 still wins 73% outright and is 7x more likely than rank-2 to be the true token at k=1 (rising to >13x at k=7). The rank-2 mass is TREE fodder (land #71 width-2 branch, rho2=0.4165) realized root-to-leaf (fern #88), NOT a mis-ranking a LINEAR acceptance loss can flip: demoting rank-1 to promote rank-2 loses more than it gains.

reconciliation_80.pr80_finding: every retrained CE/KL/recipe drafter -> MTP parity (~3.83)
reconciliation_80.pr80_conclusion: ceiling is ARCHITECTURAL (single-layer head capacity), not training schedule
reconciliation_80.pr80_tested_only_likelihood: CE + KL-distill are LIKELIHOOD objectives; #80 did NOT test an acceptance objective -> channel-2 headroom is untested on our head
reconciliation_80.rerank_channel_closed: channel-1 (re-ranking) IS closed by committed data: argmax already acceptance-ordered -> any LK gain must come from channel-2 (prediction-improvement)
reconciliation_80.single_layer_implies_lower: #80's single-layer-head finding -> we resemble the Medusa/MLP T=0 class (+1.0%) more than EAGLE-3 (+2.4%) -> realistic central nearer the floor
reconciliation_80.greedy_collapse_precedent_88: fern #88: Traversal Verification +4.57% sampling -> provably 0 greedy; same collapse direction shrinks the LK T=1 +8% to T=0 +2.4%

method: CPU-only analytic; reuses fern #88/#91 score_tree_depthrank + wirbel #79 rank-coverage; no forward pass (profile fully committed)
